title: media.rs: process_local and process_remote duplicate 20 lines of logic
description: Both functions share identical logic: sniff mime, process_image_bytes, gen_id, build filename, create_dir_all, write, compute_blurhash, SQL INSERT. If either copy is updated (e.g. to fix the mime/extension bug) the other silently diverges. Extract a private async fn store_processed_image(pool, post_id, bytes, data_dir, description) -> Result<String> and call it from both.
close_reason: All pass 4 fixes applied: media SSRF+size guard, mime/format consistency, proper keyId parsing, fail-closed sig verify, path reconstruction, key owner validation, media cap, blocking stdin fix, conflicts_with
